sentences.text: That depends on your numbers and your psychology — and this is where AI shines.

It can run both scenarios on your exact debts and show the real difference: "Avalanche saves you X in interest and gets you debt-free 2 months sooner; snowball gives you your first paid-off debt in 3 months instead of 11."
💡 DiscoveryThe best plan is the one you'll follow.
If the interest difference is small and you need momentum, the "suboptimal" snowball can be the winning choice.
